steps.title: Isolate the absolute value
steps.content:
Add $$|x-8|$$ to both sides: $$|x-8| + |x-8| = -|x-8| + 20 + |x-8|$$ simplifies to $$2|x-8| = 20$$.
Divide both sides by 2: $$|x-8| = 10$$.

steps.title: Find the sum of the solutions
steps.content:
For an equation $$|x-a| = b$$ with $$b>0$$, the two solutions are $$x = a+b$$ and $$x = a-b$$. Their sum is $$(a+b)+(a-b)=2a$$.
Here $$a=8$$ and $$b=10$$, so the sum is $$2\cdot 8 = 16$$.
That matches choice C — C is correct.
